name: What is Digital Signal Processing (DSP)?
snippet:
23 July 2025 — Digital Signal Processing (DSP) is a branch of engineering and applied mathematics that deals with the processing and analysis of digital signals.
Jul 23, 2025 — It can standardize or solve digital signals , but it can also carry out a variety of other functions , including filtering , compression, and ...

name: Digital Signal Processing (DSP) in Sound Engineering: Algorithms, Techniques, and Applications
snippet:
In simple terms, DSP is based on transforming signals into the digital domain to perform operations such as filtering, equalization, compression, and reverb.
Digital filtering is one of the cornerstones of DSP. It involves applying a filter to an audio signal to attenuate or amplify certain frequencies. Filters can ...
